panels.scene_title: Scene 1 - Shaji Pappan Wins, Loses, and Finds Pinky
panels.narration_text: Shaji Pappan and his team win a tug-of-war tournament, but their prize, a female goat named Pinky, might be more trouble than it's worth. Shaji's face: pure stress. The audience: howling. Shaji's back pain: activated. -> Visual: Quick cuts of the tug-of-war, followed by a comedic shot of Pinky the goat  |  ~20s

panels.scene_title: Scene 2 - Satan Xavier Enters with Drama
panels.narration_text: Satan Xavier, the most extra villain, appears with a plan that will somehow, definitely not work. He thinks Shaji Pappan's team has stolen something valuable. The team is like, 'Uh, no, we just have a really cute goat.' -> Visual: Over-the-top entrance for Satan Xavier, complete with dramatic music  |  ~25s

panels.scene_title: Scene 3 - Abu's Explosives Go Boom (Not in a Good Way)
panels.narration_text: Abu's explosive experiments go off with a bang, literally. His experiments are the real MVPs of chaos. Shaji Pappan's back pain: still a thing. -> Visual: Explosive fail montage with comedic sound effects  |  ~15s

panels.narration_text: The team hears about Neelakoduveli, a mystic plant that brings wealth. Because, of course, they need more ways to get into trouble. Satan Xavier and Dude are also on the hunt, because why not? -> Visual: A map or animation showing the various factions searching for Neelakoduveli  |  ~30s

panels.scene_title: Scene 5 - Road Trip of Chaos and Misunderstandings
panels.narration_text: The hunt for Neelakoduveli turns into a road trip of double-crosses and absurd misunderstandings. Shaji Pappan's iconic red and black mundu makes an appearance, symbolizing bad luck and unmatched swagger. -> Visual: Montage of the road trip, showcasing the team's antics and Satan Xavier's over-the-top villainy  |  ~40s

panels.scene_title: Scene 6 - Foolproof Plans and Epic Fails
panels.narration_text: The team comes up with 'foolproof' plans that fail epically. Abu's explosives still don't work as planned. Dude's hyper-machismo reaches new heights. It's a miracle they survive their own adventures. -> Visual: Quick cuts of the team's plans failing, with comedic sound effects and reactions  |  ~35s

panels.scene_title: Scene 7 - The Final Showdown of Chaos
panels.narration_text: The final showdown is a mess of epic proportions. Everyone's after Neelakoduveli, but mostly they're just after each other. Shaji Pappan's back pain is the real hero, though. (Featuring: full-on kalipp mode, Idukki-level chaos, poor Pinky the goat, Shaji's legendary back pain — as always.) -> Visual: An action-packed montage of the final showdown, complete with comedic moments and explosions  |  ~45s In the end, it's not about the Neelakoduveli or the money; it's about how Shaji Pappan's back survived all this chaos. -- Total words: 256 --
